evidence: Created test issue TST-001 in Backlog column via Supabase API
Dragged issue card from Backlog to Todo column using mouse-based drag-and-drop
Issue card moved to Todo column immediately - Backlog shows 0, Todo shows 1
Supabase query confirms status changed to 'todo' for issue fc07f308-cd97-43e2-9165-851fcec68c59
After full page reload, issue card remains in Todo column with correct metadata
Activity log entry 'Status changed to Todo' appeared in Logs panel confirming mutation was tracked
Cockpit shell shows 'Delegation Sandbox - Test Agency Co' with company name and AGENCY label
Header badges: 1 agents, 0 live, 0 approvals, 0 tasks (updated to 1 tasks after issue creation)
Toolbar controls present and functional: Org Chart button, Logs button, Recenter button, Kanban toggle
Logs button toggles ActionLogPanel on left side (requires 1500px+ viewport)
Project Info panel: Company Brief, Live Summary (Agents 1, Open Issues 0-1), IDLE/WORKING status
Console errors: none relevant
All 7 workflow columns confirmed via DOM query: BACKLOG, TODO, IN PROGRESS, IN REVIEW, BLOCKED, DONE, CANCELLED
Column headers visible with count badges (0 for empty columns, 1 for populated)
Issue card TST-001 shows: identifier 'TST-001', title 'Validation test issue', priority badge 'medium', assignee 'CEO'
Card metadata matches Supabase record for issue fc07f308-cd97-43e2-9165-851fcec68c59
Before drag: TST-001 in Backlog column (Backlog: 1, Todo: 0)
Drag performed via mouse move from card center (396,772) to Todo column center (648,754)
After drag: TST-001 moved to Todo column (Backlog: 0, Todo: 1)
Supabase query confirms issue status = 'todo'
After full page reload: TST-001 still in Todo column, state persisted
Logs panel opened via Logs button in cockpit toolbar (requires 1500px+ viewport)
Panel shows ACTIVITY and TECHNICAL tabs
Activity tab shows: 'CEO - Status changed to Todo - issue update' with timestamp
Filter by agent button present for filtering log entries
With no activity: shows 'NO ACTIVITY YET...' empty state (before issue drag)
After drag-and-drop: activity entry appeared immediately in the log stream
Org Chart reachable via cockpit toolbar button 'Org Chart' (data-testid='cockpit-org-chart-link')
Also reachable via sidebar link 'Org Chart' under Company section
Clicking cockpit Org Chart button navigated to /org-chart page
Page title: 'AGENCY ORG CHART'
Navigation was through in-product buttons/links, not direct URL entry
Org chart shows CEO node with: name 'CEO', title 'Chief Executive Officer', adapter 'Hermes'
Single agent matches the 1 agent for Test Agency Co in Supabase
CEO node has cursor:pointer and onclick handler, confirmed as clickable
Clicking CEO node navigated to Agent Detail page at /agents/<id>
Agent Detail shows: Name CEO, Role CEO, Title Chief Executive Officer, Status idle, Adapter Type Hermes Agent, Reports To None (root)
ERC-8004 Identity section visible: Registration Status Pending, Operator Wallet 0x1234...5678
Only 1 agent exists so no reports_to hierarchy visible, but Reports To = 'None (root)' is correctly displayed

frictions: Kanban drag-and-drop required mouse-level commands since agent-browser drag command doesn't support @refs
Logs panel requires viewport width >= 1500px due to compact mode breakpoint
